Deprecated in favor of ActionButton. 1 consumer remains — removal gate blocked.
Re-extracted from Carbon Figma file via live Figma MCP. Full variant surface: 7 styles × 7 sizes × 2 types × disabled. 14 tokens bound.
Component updated with xs and expressive sizes from live Figma extraction. Token source: presourced DTCG (auto). Stories regenerated with 7 size variants.
All 3 gates passed. Pixel: 0.0% (first run baseline). Region: 0 px². Token: 0/14 mismatches. Storybook a11y/interactions: skipped (advisory, not running).
Promoted to alpha (0.1.0-alpha.1). Figma write preflight passed. Component description updated in Figma. Changelog generated.
Rolled back — validate phase redesigned. Previous validation did not perform real Figma-vs-rendered structural comparison. Pixel/region gates removed.
Structural gate failed: verticalAlignment 15px off center. Text top-aligned via flex-col, Figma spec requires centered for lg size.
All gates passed after fix. Structural: 0 mismatches (text centered, delta=0px). Token: 0/14 mismatches. Fix: added justify-center to center-aligned size variants.
Promoted to alpha (0.1.0-alpha.2). Figma write preflight passed. Component description updated. Structural gate validated. Changelog appended.
